_comment: Judgment catalog - data for validate's step-9 gates, so candidate DISCOVERY is mechanical and the model's judgment is confined to project-doc citations and consent. Item refs are '<category>:<name>' (skill:/agent:/mcp:/plugin:), lint-checked against the rosters. overlaps: same-capability pairs surfaced only when BOTH are installed - every item carries its unique gap (the one thing only it does; the keep decision hinges on it). versionConflicts: an installed item whose guidance targets a newer major than the project runs - scan-evidence.js compares the named package's found major (first integer of its version string) against 'below'; no version found = no claim. occasionBound: legitimately-installed items that fire on occasions, not daily - the dormant advisory's list, the cadence text is the citation; the project-* capture/method set is deliberately NOT listed (it is the workflow, not dormancy). Curation bar as evidence.json: only entries that hold on unrelated projects too.

overlaps.shared: drive a browser from the session

gaps.mcp:playwright: scripted cross-browser automation, fresh-context runs, screenshots
gaps.mcp:chrome-devtools: live console/network/performance debug of an already-open Chrome tab

versionConflicts.conflict: its best-practices surface pushes signals/standalone/zoneless idioms newer than the Angular this project runs

occasionBound.skill:ilspy-decompile: ad-hoc - decompile ground truth from a .dll
occasionBound.skill:project-build-from-scratch: greenfield-time - starting a project from nothing
occasionBound.agent:security-auditor: audit-time - the deliberate security posture audit
